sections.paragraph:
(1) prop. to from, to fashion, used of a potter; this sense is preserved in the Zabian dialect in ܒܕܐ.

(2) to devise, to feign, 1Ki 12:33 (well given by the LXX. ἐπλάσατο). Neh 6:8 in each place followed by מִלִּבֹּו. Part. with suff. בֹּדָאם by a Syriacism for בֹּדְאָם Neh. loc. cit. Arab. بَدَأَ to begin, IV. to produce something new, to do and devise first; comp. بدع I. IV. to feign, to form.

I.
